arts.sum: League One leaders Birmingham made it three wins in a row when they secured their place in their place in the semi-finals of the EFL Trophy with a 1-0 win over Stevenage on Tuesday. The Blues are unb...

arts.ttl: Sven Botman and Callum Wilson injury update as Newcastle United forced to change
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe has offered an update on Dutch defender Sven Botman and confirmed that the centre-back will be absent at Birmingham this weekend. Botman scored 10/10 in the Chronicle Live match ratings and put in his best performance yet since returning from a long-term knee problem.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer reveals nine-word text he sent Newcastle United star after Arsenal semi-final
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has disclosed the nine-word message he sent a Newcastle United star following the stunning semi-final victory over Arsenal. The United icon reserved special praise for Dan Burn, revealing the contents of a private message he sent the centre-back after the second leg.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano says Newcastle are now interested in signing PL star who Alan Shearer called 'outstanding'
arts.sum: He only moved to the Premier League last year👀

arts.ttl: ‘Could cause a surprise’ – Birmingham City vs Newcastle United prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Birmingham City vs Newcastle United prediction ahead of the FA Cup clash on Saturday. The post ‘Could cause a surprise’ – Birmingham City vs Newcastle United prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United learn Wembley ticket allocation with prices to be confirmed
arts.sum: Newcastle United will release their official allocation for the 2025 Carabao Cup final in due course after beating Arsenal in the last four. It is expected that Newcastle will be handed an allocation of around 32,700 tickets for the big day.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United Carabao Cup final opponents confirmed as the Magpies don't get Wembley wish
arts.sum: Newcastle United supporters did not get their main wish and will play Liverpool rather than Tottenham Hotspur in the League Cup final at Wembley Stadium on Sunday, March 16. Both teams met for the first time in the League Cup - at the fourth round stage - three years earlier when Steve Watson scored the only goal at Anfield to knock out the then-holders.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's strong double transfer message that will shut down Paul Merson
arts.sum: Among the post-January transfer window narratives to begin unfolding this month has been a theory that the likes of Bruno Guimaraes and Alexander Isak will leave if Newcastle don't qualify for the Champions League. Although, in the aftermath of the Carabao Cup win over Arsenal, both stars committed to life at St James' Park and spoke about their tunnel vision to enjoy domestic success.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City manager Chris Davies has been snubbed for the fourth time
arts.sum: Chris Davies has missed out on the League One manager of the month award for a fourth time. He was pipped to it in August by Wrexham manager Phil Parkinson and Blackpool boss Steve Bruce beat him to it in September in a month where Blues won all of their league games.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United learn 'excellent' truth about PSR proposal slammed by Man United
arts.sum: Although Newcastle have been working to UEFA's separate regulations, anyway, which restrict spending to 70% of revenue from next season, anchoring could potentially level the playing field a little as there would be a universal spending limit in place regardless of a club's commercial turnover. That is the view of football finance expert Kieran Maguire as Premier League clubs continue to trial anchoring and squad cost rules in shadow alongside the original PSR regulations, which limit losses to £105m over a rolling three-year period.
